testsuite.name: org.spotifumtp37.delegate.AdminUI_ESTest
testsuite.system-out:
Enter file path to load: Error loading data: null SpotifUMData has been cleared. Enter filename to save serialized data (data/serial/spotifumdata.ser suggested): Error serializing data: Error in writing to file Enter filename to save serialized data (data/serial/spotifumdata.ser suggested): Data serialized successfully! Enter filename to load serialized data (data/serial/spotifumdata.ser suggested): Error deserializing data: null
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Add New Album 2 - Delete Album 3 - View All Albums 0 - Exit
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Get Most Played Song 2 - Get Most Listened Artist 3 - Get the all time top Listener (Most Songs Listened) 4 - Get Top the top Listener since a given time (Most Songs Listened) 5 - Get User With Most Points 6 - Get Most Played Genre 7 - Count Public Playlists 8 - Get User Who Created Most Playlists 0 - Exit Enter start date (yyyy-MM-dd): Invalid date format. Please use yyyy-MM-dd.
--- All Playlists ---
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Import Data from JSON 2 - Export Data to JSON 3 - Serialize System Data 4 - Deserialize System Data 5 - Clear System Data 6 - DEBUG PRINT DATA 0 - Exit Enter file path to save: Data saved successfully! Albums: java.util.HashMap@0000000057 Users: java.util.HashMap@0000000058 Playlists: java.util.HashMap@0000000059
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Manage Albums 2 - Manage Users 3 - Manage Playlists 4 - Manage Data 5 - View System Stats / Execute Queries 0 - Exit
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Create Playlist 2 - Delete Playlist 3 - View All Playlists 0 - Exit
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Delete User 2 - View All Users 0 - Exit Admin: Create New Album
--- All Albums --- No albums found in the system. Admin: Delete Album
--- All Users --- No users found in the system.
--- All Playlists --- No playlists found in the system. Admin: Delete User Admin: Create New Album Admin: Create New Album Admin: Delete Album Admin: Create Playlist Admin: Delete Playlist Admin: Delete User Admin: Delete User Admin: Create Playlist Admin: Create Playlist
